sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49407" key="qumomaxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῡμο-μᾰχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n49407.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">desperate fight</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:2:1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
